protocol_override: User approved Codex/GPT self-judge instead of Gemini API.

parsed.signature_a: A computes the sum, given a list of integers, producing an integer.
parsed.signature_b: B computes validation results, given input strings, producing ok or error messages.

same_problem.why: The programs compute different outputs or solve different requested tasks.

same_technique.why: Their core programming techniques are different.

same_domain.why: Their primary data domains do not overlap.
